Squeeze

button_animations.css:
{{BTN}} { transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease; }
{{BTN}}:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px -8px rgba(0,0,0,.45); }

text.text_content:
Staying in control

An important word on responsible gambling.

Many people enjoy gambling, but it can be addictive and, for some, it comes at a cost. PayForItUK only features operators licensed by the UK Gambling Commission who are committed to the BGC 7th Edition Industry Code.

custom_html.custom_html_content:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"></path></svg>
      

            Your protection toolkit

text.text_content:
Deposit limits
Set daily, weekly or monthly spending caps to manage your budget.

Reality checks
Automated alerts that keep you aware of how long your session has lasted.

Time-outs
Take an instant break from your account, from 24 hours up to six weeks.

10x wagering cap
All featured brands comply with the Jan 2026 UKGC rule capping bonus wagering at 10x.

custom_html.custom_html_content:
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"></path></svg>

            Talk · Ban · Stop

T
Talk — for free, confidential advice 24/7, call the National Gambling Helpline on 0808 8020 133, operated by GamCare.

B
Ban — install GamBan on your devices to block thousands of gambling sites and apps.

S
Stop — register with GAMSTOP to self-exclude from every UK-licensed online gambling site in one step.
Need to speak to someone now? National Gambling Helpline 0808 8020 133

text.text_content: Professional clinical support and treatment are available through the National Gambling Support Network and the NHS. PayForItUK is a vetted affiliate. All featured operators are licensed by the UK Gambling Commission and compliant with the BGC 7th Edition Industry Code. 18+ only.

copyright_text.copyright_content: © {year} PayForItUK. Operated by [Company Ltd], registered in England & Wales (Company No. XXXXXXX). 18+. Gambling can be addictive — please play responsibly.
